allow: Bash(node -e "const l = require\(''lucide-angular''\); const keys = Object.keys\(l\).filter\(k => k !== ''LucideAngularModule'' && !k.startsWith\(''lucide''\)\); console.log\(keys.slice\(0,20\).join\('', ''\)\); console.log\(''Has Bot:'', ''Bot'' in l\); console.log\(''Has Globe:'', ''Globe'' in l\); console.log\(''Has GitBranch:'', ''GitBranch'' in l\); console.log\(''Has GitMerge:'', ''GitMerge'' in l\); console.log\(''Has StickyNote:'', ''StickyNote'' in l\); console.log\(''Has Sparkles:'', ''Sparkles'' in l\);")
